titleStmt.title: SII 15.5: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 5. (B.K. No. 36 of 1928-29.) ARASIBĪḌI, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab standing on a hill to the right of the Jaina basti.
This is dated the Chālukya-Vikrama year 31, Vyaya, Paushya, ba. 9, Wednesday, corresponding to 1106 A.D., December 19, Wednesday, f.d.t. °92.

It registers a gift of fixed shares in the income from the Pannāya tax for a feeding house in the Vishṇu temple of the Brahmapuri of the capital town of Vikramapura by Mahāpradhāna, Daṇḍanāyaka, Mādhavabhaṭṭa with the approval of Mahāprachaṇḍadaṇḍanāyaka, Bāṇasaverggaḍe Anantapāḷa-daṇḍanāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in between Nos. 135 and 96 of South Indian Inscriptions, Vol, XI, parts II and I respectively.
div.p:
svasti samastarājyabhāranirūpita mahāmātyapadavīvirājamāna mānōnnata prabhu maṁtrōtsāha śakti
trayasaṁpannarappa śrīmanmahāpradhānanaccupannāyadadhiṣṭāyaka daṁḍanāyaka mādhava bhaṭṭaru
vritta . kuladoḷu peṁpina Ārppinoḷu vibhavadoḷu sauṁdaryyadoḷu dhairyyadoḷu caladoḷu satyadoḷaṇminoḷu
patihitabyāpāradoḷu nītiyoḷu baladoḷu mādhavabhaṭṭanēṁ danujanoḷu dānakke kōḍiṭṭanaṁ kalikālēya
kaḷaṁkapaṁkiḷaranantuṁ pōlisalu ballarē . śrīmanmahāpradhāna daṁḍanāyakaṁ mādhava bhaṭṭaraccupannāya
maṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷuttamiḻdu śrīmanmahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ bhāṇasaverggaḍe Anantapāḷa
daṁḍanāyakaṁge binnapaṁgeydu śrīrājadhāni vikramapurada brahmapurigalliya viṣṇugri
hadalliya satrakke biṭṭa dharmmameṁteṁdaḍe Allikoysideleya pēṟiṁge tamma pannāyada suṁ
kadoḷage biṭṭa vīsa 10 poṟege vīsa 5 paṇavinelege vīsa 1 Iṁtī puṭṭidartthadalu nityāni
ka pannirvvaru brāhmaṇaruṇbaṁtāgi śrīmaccāḷukya vikrama variṣada 31 neya vyaya saṁvatsa
rada pauṣya bahuḷa 9 mi saumya(ma)vārada Uttarāyaṇa seṁkramaṇadalu biṭṭarī dharmmamaṁ
svadharmmadalu rakṣisidavaru vāraṇāsiyaloṁdu kōṭikavileyanaḷaṁkārasahi
tavanibaru vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge dānakoṭṭa phalamaneyduvarintīdharmmamanaḷida
varāsthānadali nityakavileyumananibarbrāhmaṇarumanaḷida dōṣamaneyduvaru ©
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvā nētān bhā
vinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁdharāḥ ṣaṣṭhivarṣa sahasrāṇi . viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatēkrimiḥ . ©
Digital edition of SII 15.5 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
